tasks.title: Define Supabase database schema for rooms, players, and map_data
tasks.description: Create PostgreSQL schema with tables for rooms (id, name, owner_id, created_at), players (id, user_id, room_id, x, y, avatar_url, status), and map_data (id, room_id, tileset_json, collision_layer, properties). Include RLS policies.
acceptance_criteria: RLS policies enabled on all tables
Schema supports room creation and player joining

tasks.title: Implement Supabase Auth integration
tasks.description: Set up Supabase Auth for user authentication (email, magic links). Configure auth state management in the frontend and protect routes.
acceptance_criteria: Users can sign up and sign in
User profile created on first login

tasks.title: Set up Supabase Realtime for player position sync
tasks.description: Configure Supabase Realtime (broadcast/presence) for low-latency player position synchronization. Use Socket.io on backend for authoritative movement handling.
acceptance_criteria: Player positions broadcast to all room participants

tasks.title: Implement authoritative server movement validation
tasks.description: Create Socket.io server that validates player movement against collision layer from Tiled JSON map. Broadcast validated state every 100ms.
acceptance_criteria: Server validates movement against collision layer
State broadcasted to all clients at 10Hz

tasks.title: Implement Phaser 3 grid-based movement system
tasks.description: Build 32x32 pixel grid movement with WASD/Arrow key controls. Add ghost mode (G key) for passing through players and collisions.
acceptance_criteria: Ghost mode allows passing through collisions

tasks.title: Add collision detection against map tiles
tasks.description: Implement collision detection using Tiled JSON map collision layer. Prevent player movement into blocked tiles.
acceptance_criteria: Players cannot walk through collision tiles
Collision layer loaded from map JSON

tasks.title: Implement proximity detection for audio/video activation
tasks.description: Calculate Euclidean distance between avatars. Trigger LiveKit audio/video streams when distance < 200px.

tasks.title: Implement spatial audio with attenuation and stereo panning
tasks.description: Use Web Audio API PannerNode for spatial audio. Implement logarithmic volume attenuation and stereo panning based on relative X position.
acceptance_criteria: Audio pans left/right based on X position

tasks.title: Implement private zones and quiet zones
tasks.description: Add support for special map zones: private zones (same private_id can hear regardless of distance) and quiet zones (reduced activation radius).
acceptance_criteria: Private zones connect users regardless of distance
Audio from outside private zone is muted
Quiet zones have reduced activation radius
Zones defined in Tiled map properties

tasks.title: Integrate LiveKit for audio/video streaming
tasks.description: Set up LiveKit room management. Connect spatial audio/video tracks to players within proximity radius.
acceptance_criteria: LiveKit room created per game room
Tracks subscribed only for players within 200px
Clean up tracks when players leave

tasks.title: Create map loading and rendering system
tasks.description: Build Phaser scene that loads Tiled JSON maps. Render tilesets and collision layers. Support map properties for zones.

tasks.title: Store and retrieve map data from Supabase
tasks.description: Save map configurations to Supabase. Allow rooms to have different maps. Load map data on room join.
acceptance_criteria: Rooms reference map_data via foreign key
Map JSON retrievable on room join

tasks.title: Implement interactive objects (iframe, video, links)
tasks.description: Add support for interactive objects: iframe objects (websites/docs), video objects (YouTube/Twitch), external links. Trigger with X key.
acceptance_criteria: Objects highlight when player is near

tasks.title: Add visual feedback and UI elements
tasks.description: Implement talking indicators (aura/speech bubble), connection status loader, and basic HUD elements.
acceptance_criteria: Talking indicator shows when mic detects speech
Connection status loader during WebRTC setup
Basic HUD with room name and user info
Visual distinction for different player states

tasks.title: Review Supabase schema design
tasks.description: Review database schema for rooms, players, and map_data. Ensure proper indexing, RLS policies, and performance.
acceptance_criteria: Proper indexes on frequently queried columns
No circular dependencies or design flaws

tasks.title: Review real-time sync implementation
tasks.description: Review Socket.io and Supabase Realtime implementation for latency, reliability, and edge cases.
acceptance_criteria: No race conditions in position updates
